reference: Dear Doctor, I am twenty-three years old. My height is five feet seven inches, and my weight is fifty-four kilograms. I want my penis to stay erect for more than five minutes when I am having sexual intercourse with my girlfriend. For that, can I use any medication that has no side effects or will not harm my body in the future? Please suggest the name of a medication that I can normally use.
text: Dear Doctor, I am twenty-three years old, my height is five feet seven inches, and my weight is fifty-four kilograms. I want my penis to stay erect for more than five minutes when I am having sexual intercourse with my girlfriend. That, can I use any medication that has no side effects, or will not harm my body in the future? Please suggest the name of a medication that I can normally use.
